headline: CLOSE THE LOOP
subheading: Build a CAPA system that proves problems are gone and stay gone
flux_prompt: An abstract editorial composition evoking a closed-loop quality control cycle in pharmaceutical compliance: a continuous glowing circular pathway of interlocking arrows looping seamlessly back on itself, suspended in a deep navy void, suggesting corrective action flowing into verification and effectiveness checks. Translucent layered glass panels and a faint flowing data ribbon trace the cycle through stages, with delicate connecting nodes like an evidence trail and subtle precision grid lines implying audit-ready documentation and root-cause investigation. Cool teal and luminous cyan light defines the looping circuit and reflects off polished glass edges, while a single fresh-green accent glows at one node like a status indicator confirming a problem resolved. Clinical-luxury mood, premium minimalism, soft volumetric depth, shallow focus, conveying precision, accountability and continuous improvement. 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
